---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---



```{r}
library(scDblFinder)
# ── Switch to scDblFinder — works natively with Seurat v5 ─────────────────
library(scDblFinder)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
sample_list <- SplitObject(dat_tc4, split.by = "Patient.Number")
sample_list <- lapply(sample_list, function(s) {
cat("Processing sample:", unique(s$Patient.Number), "\n")
# ── Convert to SingleCellExperiment ───────────────────────────────────────
sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(s)
# ── Run scDblFinder ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
sce <- scDblFinder(sce)
# ── Transfer results back to Seurat ───────────────────────────────────────
s$scDblFinder.class  <- sce$scDblFinder.class   # "singlet" or "doublet"
s$scDblFinder.score  <- sce$scDblFinder.score   # doublet probability 0-1
cat("Doublets found:", sum(sce$scDblFinder.class == "doublet"), "\n")
cat("Singlets kept:", sum(sce$scDblFinder.class == "singlet"), "\n\n")
# ── Remove doublets ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
s_clean <- subset(s, subset = scDblFinder.class == "singlet")
cat("Cells before:", ncol(s), "| after:", ncol(s_clean),
"| removed:", ncol(s) - ncol(s_clean), "\n\n")
return(s_clean)
})
# ── Re-merge ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
dat_tc4_clean <- merge(sample_list[[1]], y = sample_list[-1])
cat("Final merged cell count:", ncol(dat_tc4_clean), "\n")
# ── Visualize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FeaturePlot(dat_tc4_clean, features = "scDblFinder.score") +
ggtitle("scDblFinder doublet score")
# ── Re-process merged object after doublet removal ────────────────────────
DefaultAssay(dat_tc4_clean) <- "RNA"
dat_tc4_clean <- NormalizeData(dat_tc4_clean)
dat_tc4_clean <- FindVariableFeatures(dat_tc4_clean)
dat_tc4_clean <- ScaleData(dat_tc4_clean)
dat_tc4_clean <- RunPCA(dat_tc4_clean)
dat_tc4_clean <- RunUMAP(dat_tc4_clean, dims = 1:20)
# ── Now visualize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FeaturePlot(dat_tc4_clean, features = "scDblFinder.score") +
ggtitle("scDblFinder doublet score")
DimPlot(dat_tc4_clean,
group.by = "scDblFinder.class",
cols     = c("singlet" = "grey80", "doublet" = "red")) +
ggtitle("scDblFinder doublet calls")
# ── Check B cell markers after cleaning ───────────────────────────────────
FeaturePlot(dat_tc4_clean,
features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "IGHG1"),
ncol     = 3)
# ── Check cell type distribution preserved ────────────────────────────────
DimPlot(dat_tc4_clean,
group.by = "gen_cell_types2",
label    = TRUE) +
ggtitle("Cell types after doublet removal")
qsave(dat_tc4_clean, "dat_tc4_doublets_removed.qs")
cat("Saved: dat_tc4_doublets_removed.rds\n")
DimPlot(dat_tc4_clean,
group.by = "cell_types2",
label    = TRUE) +
ggtitle("Cell types after doublet removal")
DimPlot(dat_tc4_clean,
group.by = "cell_types2",
label    = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
ggtitle("Cell types after doublet removal")
dat_tc4 <- NormalizeData(dat_tc4)
dat_tc4 <- FindVariableFeatures(dat_tc4)
dat_tc4 <- ScaleData(dat_tc4)
dat_tc4 <- RunPCA(dat_tc4)
dat_tc4 <- RunUMAP(dat_tc4, dims = 1:20)
DimPlot(dat_tc4,
group.by = "cell_types2",
label    = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
ggtitle("Cell types before doublet removal (reran UMAP")
DimPlot(dat_tc4,
group.by = "gen_cell_types2",
label    = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
ggtitle("Cell types before doublet removal (reran UMAP")
DimPlot(dat_tc4,
group.by = "gen_cell_types2",
label    = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
ggtitle("Cell types before doublet removal (reran UMAP)")
DimPlot(dat_tc4,
features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "IGHG1"),ncol = 3)
DimPlot(dat_tc4,features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "IGHG1"),ncol = 3)
FeaturePlot(dat_tc4,
features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "IGHG1"),
ncol     = 3)
dat_tclean4=qread("dat-tmde1-clean4-removed-clus-6-9.qs")
FeaturePlot(dat_tclean4,
features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "IGHG1"),
ncol     = 3)
FeaturePlot(dat_tc4_clean,
features = c("MS4A1", "CD79A", "IGHG1"),
ncol     = 3)
DimPlot(dat_tclean4, reduction="umap", label=TRUE, repel = TRUE)
Idents(dat_tclean4) = "gen_cell_types2"
DimPlot(dat_tclean4, reduction="umap", label=TRUE, repel = TRUE)
Idents(dat_tclean4) = "cell_types2"
DimPlot(dat_tclean4, reduction="umap", label=TRUE, repel = TRUE)
DimPlot(dat_tc4_clean, reduction="umap", label=TRUE, repel = TRUE)
Idents(dat_tc4_clean) = "cell_types2"
DimPlot(dat_tc4_clean, reduction="umap", label=TRUE, repel = TRUE)
DimPlot(dat_tc4_clean, reduction="umap", label=TRUE, repel = TRUE)+NoLegend()
```
